prestazioni: 1JZ-GTE (non-VVTi) engine rebuild with forged internals: Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 1.5mm overbore (88mm) to achieve 2.7L displacement, supporting 1.4 bar boost with a Garrett GT3582R turbo (compressor wheel trimmed to 0.82 A/R for spool optimization on the JZX81's long-runner intake manifold).

Custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L, featuring a 4-2-1 merge collector (304-grade stainless) and a 100mm titanium-tipped muffler (HKS Super SQV4 blow-off valve integrated into the piping for pressure relief).

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom 4D ignition map calibrated for E85 fuel (flex-fuel sensor integration) and a dual-stage nitrous oxide system (NOS 55002 Big Shot Fogger kit) with progressive controller for 150hp supplemental shots at 6,500 RPM (activated via paddle shifter trigger).
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody conversion kit (JZX81-specific, retaining OEM rain gutters and marker light recesses) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (150mm flares, dry carbon by Seibon) and relocated rear quarter windows (shaved and bonded, no OEM glass).

Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +15 front / 17x10.5 +25 rear wheels (ET-adjusted for JZX81 hubs) wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires, paired with custom poly bushings (SuperPro 90A durometer) and Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (JZX81-specific valving, 8kg/mm front / 9kg/mm rear springs).

Custom front bumper lip by Rocket Bunny (JZX81-specific mold, no fog light delete) with integrated carbon fiber canards (dry carbon by APR Performance) and a rear diffuser by Veilside Fortune (modified to fit JZX81's OEM bumper cutouts, 3D-printed ABS end caps for exhaust clearance).
